_comment: Shadow Tester configuration. Copy to shadow_config.json and edit.
_comment_compare_keys: Optional. If set, only these top-level response keys are diffed. Omit the field (or set null) to compare full responses.

tests.description: GET /api/status — both servers should be reachable
POST /api/scan — function + edge counts must match
GET /api/services — service list must be identical
